name: eval spec schema: subject must match `<kind>:<name>` where kind ∈ detector|hook|subagent|skill (§2.4)
command: echo '{"name":"t","command":"echo hi","setup":[],"expect":{"exit_code":0},"subject":"invalid-subject-format"}' > spec.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-eval-spec.sh" spec.json 2>&1 | grep -q "subject" && echo ok >&2
